title: Sami's Phonk Pack
description: Replaces Minecraft’s soundtrack with twelve "Phonk" tracks across all categories, delivering nonstop immersive gameplay.
body:
# Sami's Phonk Pack
This pack is a simple Phonk Pack that Adds phonk songs as minecraft music that appears in the Game, Menu and etc... (Songs listed in the versions description).
**Thanks for downloading!**
